# Krish Rathi Portfolio

Canonical URL: https://krishrathi.online/

Krish Rathi is an AI/ML and full-stack developer from Gurgaon, India. He builds AI agents, RAG chatbots, agentic browsers, stock intelligence tools, agricultural AI platforms, and production-grade web applications.

The site now presents his profile as an interactive AI control room with a terminal-style build signal panel, project deep-dive deck, proof wall, build timeline, and collaboration lanes.

Important profile links:
- GitHub: https://github.com/krishrathi1
- LeetCode: https://leetcode.com/u/krishrathi/
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/krish-rathi-036222293/
- Resume: https://krishrathi.online/Krish_Rathi_Resume.pdf

Featured projects:
- StockVision: AI stock intelligence platform with Gemini AI, price feeds, semantic search, portfolio tracking, alerts, and charts.
- KishanBhai: Offline-first agricultural intelligence PWA with AI crop detection, multilingual assistance, weather, market prices, and soil data.
- Agentic AI Browser: LLM-powered browser for multi-step task execution, semantic search, summarization, and workflow automation.

Public proof signals as of 2026-06-12:
- 59+ public GitHub repositories
- 1,161+ GitHub contributions in 2026
- 264+ LeetCode problems solved
- 164+ LeetCode active days
